title: Sections/blocks for Workdocs
excerpt:
Feature request: The ability to drag and reorganize chunks of text (not just one line) in docs. This would be particularly useful with nested text, such as header > text > bullet point.

posts.author: etti (Etti Calderon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature request: The ability to drag and reorganize chunks of text (not just one line) in docs. This would be particularly useful with nested text, such as header > text > bullet point.
With the current functionality I need to copy and paste in order to move text.
